classes.name: Tile and mosaic seam
classes.definition: Boundary where adjacent source scenes or rendered tiles differ radiometrically, temporally, geometrically, or texturally.
signatures: Possible continuation across multiple land-cover types
contradictions: Boundary follows real terrain or parcel geometry
No radiometric or geometric discontinuity
Feature persists identically across independent providers
classes.restriction: Object interpretation allowed only if geometric continuity is verified.

classes.name: Radiometric balancing mismatch
classes.definition: Localized or scene-wide color, brightness, contrast, or white-balance difference introduced during image normalization.
signatures: Uniform tonal change across varied terrain
contradictions: Change follows material boundary
Consistent shadow geometry explains shift
classes.restriction: Spectral/land-cover inference degraded; geometry may remain usable.

classes.name: Localized directional smear
classes.definition: Small-area image deformation where texture is dragged predominantly along one direction.
contradictions: Objects resolve coherently in raw imagery
Shadows and crowns maintain independent geometry
classes.restriction: Object-level interpretation prohibited within affected ROI.

classes.name: Motion blur and scan-line distortion
classes.definition: Directional blur or banding introduced by platform motion, sensor readout, or scan geometry.
signatures: Consistent directional blur over a strip
contradictions: Blur limited to semantic object class
Sharp independent provider image shows same forms
classes.restriction: Fine-object interpretation degraded or prohibited depending on severity.

classes.name: Resampling and interpolation artifact
classes.definition: Blur, ringing, stair-stepping, aliasing, or invented texture caused by scale transformation or reprojection.
contradictions: Artifact unchanged in native-resolution raw tile
Independent source reproduces geometry
classes.restriction: Do not infer subpixel objects or exact boundaries.

classes.name: Compression, ringing, and blocking
classes.definition: Lossy encoding artifacts that create block boundaries, halos, mosquito noise, or false texture.
contradictions: Patterns align with actual structures across sources

classes.name: Orthorectification and relief displacement
classes.definition: Geometric error caused by terrain-model limitations, off-nadir viewing, or incorrect elevation correction.
contradictions: No displacement against authoritative control
Same geometry across epochs/providers
classes.restriction: Position and shape measurements prohibited until registered.

classes.name: Parallax and tall-object lean
classes.definition: Apparent displacement or leaning of tall objects due to off-nadir imaging geometry.
contradictions: No relationship to viewing geometry
Object remains displaced in orthogonal imagery
classes.restriction: Footprint interpretation must use object bases, not tops.

classes.name: Cloud, haze, shadow, and atmospheric masking
classes.definition: Obscuration or replacement associated with clouds, haze, cloud shadow, atmospheric correction, or masking.
contradictions: Persistent land-cover boundary across clear imagery
classes.restriction: Feature absence cannot be inferred inside obscured/masked regions.

classes.name: Temporal mismatch and seasonal discontinuity
classes.definition: Adjacent portions of a composite represent different acquisition dates or seasons.
contradictions: Same discontinuity in single-date source imagery
classes.restriction: No single-date event inference across the boundary.

classes.name: Duplicate imagery and clone patch
classes.definition: Repeated terrain or object texture caused by copy-fill, mosaicking error, or duplicated tiles.
contradictions: Independent imagery confirms both repeated structures
classes.restriction: All object counts and spatial relationships inside candidate patches suspended.

classes.name: Missing-data fill or synthetic reconstruction
classes.definition: Region filled, inpainted, synthesized, or substituted because valid observations were unavailable.
contradictions: Raw source contains matching observed detail
classes.restriction: Treat all object-level content as non-observational until provenance is resolved.

roi_roles.ROI_LOCAL_CONTROL: Nearby region with comparable land cover and illumination.
roi_roles.ROI_BOUNDARY_CONTROL: Comparable natural edge without the suspected defect.
roi_roles.ROI_REMOTE_CONTROL: Same semantic class elsewhere in the frame or source.

confidence_rubric.criteria: Independent raw/source corroboration plus diagnostic measurements; contradictions resolved.
Multiple diagnostic signatures and matched controls; no major unresolved contradiction.
Some diagnostic evidence, but source provenance or cross-source validation is incomplete.
Weak or ambiguous signatures; viable real-world false positives remain.
